news.paragraph: Recent market movement has been pressured by accelerating inflation and rising oil prices, which have contributed to broader tech weakness. Traders should also monitor potential geopolitical developments as major technology leaders prepare for visits to China. These macroeconomic headwinds and shifting sector dynamics are the primary factors currently influencing the index.
